TanStack Router family bump — unblock the production-minor-patch Dependabot group
Accommodation partial-update data loss — partial JSONB objects + shallow-merge nested columns
epics.archiveNote: PR #1632 merged to staging. Converter emits partial nested objects (no default injection) + extraInfo/contactInfo deep-partial in update schema + price/extraInfo/contactInfo/socialNetworks/location added to mergeableJsonbColumns. Adversarial review caught + fixed a null-merge column-corruption bug (col::jsonb || 'null' yields [x,null], not a clear) — guarded in buildMergeSetClause. Tests: schemas 4877, db 960, api patch-persistence 13.
epics.note: P1 fix. 3 coordinated changes: converter emits partial nested objects (no default injection); AccommodationUpdateInputSchema makes extraInfo+contactInfo inner fields optional; AccommodationModel.mergeableJsonbColumns gains price/extraInfo/contactInfo/socialNetworks/location. Regression tests in schemas+db+api.

epics.title: Deterministic Billing for E2E — QZPay test-control wiring + date-aware publish gate
epics.archiveNote: PR #1586 merged to staging (4f374036a); E2E P0 Suite green. Final 2 blockers closed: failNext scoped by ownerId (parallel-worker contamination) + publish() promotes PRIVATE->PUBLIC visibility (robust variant — never clobbers RESTRICTED or explicit caller visibility; adversarial review caught the unconditional-PUBLIC security regression). T-012 host-07d deferred; qzpay test-control hardening + deferred coverage tracked in SPEC-221.
epics.note: 15/16 (T-012 host-07d deferred to SPEC-221). Earlier blocker (Zod 4 .partial() not stripping .default()) fixed via stripShapeDefaults across 32 update/patch schemas. T-011 (host-07c) + T-013 (res-01) verified live. T-014/T-015 done. T-016 CI soak green.

Centralizes translateApiError from apps/web/src/lib/api-errors.ts into @repo/i18n (T-001..T-004); web shim re-export preserves all existing callers. Excluded: cache internals, error-boundaries, logger, native JS errors. Zero breaking changes to existing callers.
